summary: Phase 3 Features VERIFIED: (1) Radar Alerts page with live signal feed, watches CRUD, create watch modal. (2) Verified Winners page with leaderboard, submit winner modal, stats cards. (3) Push to Shopify button on Product Detail page. Fixed JSONResponse import bug in shopify.py. All backend APIs pass 21/21 tests.

minor.issue: Endpoint returns 404 - not implemented. Submit Winner modal uses this for product search. Workaround: direct Product ID input

passed_tests: BACKEND: POST /api/radar/watches creates a new watch with name, watch_type, condition, notify_email, notify_in_app
BACKEND: GET /api/radar/watches returns user's watches
BACKEND: PUT /api/radar/watches/{id} toggles active status
BACKEND: DELETE /api/radar/watches/{id} removes a watch
BACKEND: GET /api/radar/live-events returns live signal feed with trend_spike, new_ads, supplier_demand, competition_drop events
BACKEND: GET /api/radar/live-events requires authentication
BACKEND: GET /api/winners/ (public) returns verified winners leaderboard with stats
BACKEND: GET /api/winners/?sort=upvotes|recent|revenue supports sorting
BACKEND: POST /api/winners/submit requires authentication
BACKEND: POST /api/winners/submit creates winner submission (status: pending)
BACKEND: GET /api/winners/my-submissions returns user's submissions
BACKEND: POST /api/winners/{id}/upvote requires authentication
BACKEND: POST /api/winners/{id}/verify requires admin role
BACKEND: POST /api/shopify/push-product requires authentication
BACKEND: POST /api/shopify/push-product returns friendly error without Shopify connection
BACKEND: POST /api/shopify/push-product validates product_id required
BACKEND: GET /api/shopify/exports returns export history
BACKEND: GET /api/shopify/exports requires authentication
FRONTEND: Radar Alerts page loads at /radar-alerts with data-testid='radar-alerts-page'
FRONTEND: Radar Alerts - 'Your Watches' section displays existing watches
FRONTEND: Radar Alerts - 'Live Signal Feed' displays 15 signal events (trend_spike, new_ads, supplier_demand, competition_drop)
FRONTEND: Radar Alerts - 'New Watch' button opens Create Radar Watch modal

FRONTEND: Radar Alerts - Create Watch modal has name input, watch type buttons (Score Alert, Category Trend, Competitor Activity), condition dropdown, threshold input, email/in-app checkboxes, submit button
FRONTEND: Verified Winners page loads at /verified-winners with data-testid='verified-winners-page'
FRONTEND: Verified Winners - Stats cards show 0 Verified Winners, 1 Pending Review, 0 Total Upvotes
FRONTEND: Verified Winners - Sort dropdown (Most Upvoted, Most Recent, Highest Revenue)
FRONTEND: Verified Winners - Category filter dropdown
FRONTEND: Verified Winners - Empty state message when no verified winners
FRONTEND: Verified Winners - 'Submit a Winner' button opens modal
FRONTEND: Verified Winners - Submit modal has product search, Product ID input, revenue dropdown, timeframe dropdown, proof textarea, niche input, ad platform dropdown, tips textarea
FRONTEND: Product Detail - 'Push to Shopify' button present (data-testid='push-to-shopify-btn')
FRONTEND: Product Detail - 'Launch Store' button present (data-testid='launch-store-btn')
FRONTEND: Product Detail - Push to Shopify shows friendly error toast when no connection
FRONTEND: Sidebar navigation includes 'Radar Alerts' link at /radar-alerts
FRONTEND: Sidebar navigation includes 'Verified Winners' link at /verified-winners

verified_features.verification: Live feed shows 15 signal events with types: trend_spike, new_ads, supplier_demand, competition_drop. Each event has icon, title, detail, product image, launch score
Create, read, toggle, delete watches. Watches show name, type, trigger count, notification settings
Modal has name input, 3 watch types (product_score, category_trend, competitor_new_products), condition operator dropdown (Drops below/Rises above), threshold input, email/in-app checkboxes
Public endpoint returns verified winners with sort (upvotes/recent/revenue) and category filters. Stats show verified count, pending count, total upvotes

Submit modal with product search/ID, revenue range ($1K-5K to $100K+), timeframe (1 week to 6 months+), proof description (required), store niche, ad platform, tips. Submissions go to 'pending' status for admin review
Upvote endpoint toggles - calling again removes upvote. Requires authentication
Admin-only endpoint verifies or rejects submissions. Sets status to 'verified' or 'rejected'

verified_features.feature: Push to Shopify - Product Detail Button
verified_features.verification: 'Push to Shopify' button present alongside 'Launch Store'. Clicking shows friendly error when no Shopify connection. Success would push product as draft to Shopify
Returns user's Shopify export history with product_id, shopify_product_id, status, exported_at
'Radar Alerts' (Activity icon, /radar-alerts) and 'Verified Winners' (Trophy icon, /verified-winners) links in sidebar navigation

seed_data_creation: None - used existing data. Radar watches created during testing cleaned up. Winner submission test may have created 1 pending submission.

bug_fixes_applied.issue: NameError: name 'JSONResponse' is not defined - caused 500 error on push-product endpoint

context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 features fully verified: (1) Radar Alerts at /radar-alerts with live signal feed (trend_spike, new_ads, supplier_demand, competition_drop events), watches CRUD, create watch modal with 3 watch types (product_score, category_trend, competitor_new_products). (2) Verified Winners at /verified-winners with public leaderboard, submit winner modal (requires product_id, revenue_range, timeframe, proof_description), upvote toggle, admin verify endpoint. (3) Push to Shopify button on product detail pages - requires active Shopify connection via Settings->Connections, otherwise shows friendly error. /api/products/search endpoint returns 404 (not implemented) but submit modal has fallback direct Product ID input. All data-testid attributes properly implemented.
